# Pursue Networking - Local Blog

> Pursue Networking is a Business Networking serving Atlanta, GA. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO, and AEO content to help residents find trusted local services.

## About

- **Business:** Pursue Networking
- **Industry:** Business Networking
- **Location:** Atlanta, GA
- **Website:** https://pursuenetworking.com
- **Blog:** https://localblog.pursuenetworking.com/blog/

## Topics Covered

This blog covers local service topics including: business networking Atlanta GA, professional networking Atlanta, business networking events Atlanta, small business networking Atlanta GA, local business networking Atlanta, Business Networking East Point, Business Networking Marietta, Business Networking Smyrna

## Content Schedule

- Monday: SEO articles targeting local search keywords
- Wednesday: Local authority content (best-of lists, how-to guides, cost guides)
- Thursday: GEO and AEO content optimized for AI search engines
